import React from 'react'; import './patienttable.css'; const PatientTable = () => { // This is "Mock Data" - we will replace this with MongoDB data in the Backend phase const patients = [ { id: "HOS-001", name: "Alice Johnson", age: 28, gender: "Female", status: "Admitted", room: "302" }, { id: "HOS-002", name: "Mark Peterson", age: 45, gender: "Male", status: "Pending", room: "Waiting" }, { id: "HOS-003", name: "Sonia Gupta", age: 33, gender: "Female", status: "Discharged", room: "N/A" }, { id: "HOS-004", name: "David Miller", age: 52, gender: "Male", status: "Admitted", room: "105" }, { id: "HOS-001", name: "Alice Johnson", age: 28, gender: "Female", status: "Admitted", room: "302" }, { id: "HOS-002", name: "Mark Peterson", age: 45, gender: "Male", status: "Pending", room: "Waiting" }, { id: "HOS-003", name: "Sonia Gupta", age: 33, gender: "Female", status: "Discharged", room: "N/A" }, { id: "HOS-004", name: "David Miller", age: 52, gender: "Male", status: "Admitted", room: "105" }, ]; return (

); }; export default PatientTable;
